products.name: Zaini Emilia crema fondente
pros: Highest overall rating in Altroconsumo’s 2025 test
Excellent balance of hazelnut flavor and low sugar content
Competitive price, best value per kilogram

products.name: SELEX CREMA SPALMABILE NOCCIOLE
pros: Recommended by Altroconsumo as a top choice
Positive sensory evaluation in laboratory tests

trustedSourceSummary: Exact official tests for "Crema Al Cioccolato" were not available in 2025-2026, so the broader official category "crema spalmabile" was used. No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 reviews identify Zaini Emilia crema fondente as the best hazelnut spread and also recommend SELEX crema spalmabile nocciole; both findings are from recent tests (August–September 2025).
videoSource: Migliori marche di Creme alla nocciola
